canvas: reactflow 11 (package 'reactflow', plus @xyflow/react 12 also in deps — only reactflow 11 imported)
styling: Tailwind 3.4, zero theme.extend — no tokens anywhere
fonts: system default only; DM Sans + Instrument Serif imported ad hoc inside ProInterestButton.tsx via @import
palette: no token system. Hex literals inline: #FF8811 (147×), #F4D06F (77×), #9DD9D2 (44×), #FFF8F0 (20×) on landing; raw Tailwind stone/gray/blue/green/purple/red across app
motion: no motion library; ad-hoc keyframes in index.css and inline <style> blocks inside components
spacing: default Tailwind scale, no semantic tokens
preserve: stack (CRA + Tailwind + ReactFlow), routes, component ownership, Supabase/LLM/SSE layers
introduce: full token system (light+dark), type pairing, macrostructure, motion discipline, slop-test gates
